summary: Standing directives from Jesse (@[account-redacted]) governing all kernel design and the research programme. These SUPERSEDE any earlier framing that conflicts with them. In particular they demote the "SHACL/DL as destination" language in `docs/design-constraint-layer.md` and the "DL is the right interchange format" language in `docs/design-dl-from-nsm-and-lean-reconstruction.md` — see §1.
title: Kernel design & research directives (2026-07-08)
